patch.value: export --apply exits 0 even when every item fails to write

The export --apply handler calls applyExportPlan() and then returns { applied:true, ... } and exits 0 regardless of outcome. Per-item-continue isolation is intentional, but when a non-empty plan results in zero successes and at least one failure (created===0 && updated===0 && failed>0) the command still exited 0. A CI/script step would see success when nothing was written to GitHub.

Non-empty all-fail batch throws CommandError(GENERIC_FAILURE=1) after the per-item errors/summary are emitted; partial success (>=1 created/updated) still exits 0; empty plan still exits 0; unit tests cover all-fail/partial/empty/full via applyOutcomeError; release:check green.

author: claude

patch.value: Verified shipped: applyOutcomeError throws CommandError(1) on non-empty all-fail batch; partial/empty still exit 0. Tests present (applyOutcomeError all-fail/partial/empty). Code index.ts:1144-1164, tests in smoke.test.ts.
